column3: Developer makefile; defines CWARNSCPP/CWARNGCC flag sets and platform targets (linux, macosx, mingw)
Public C API implementation; lua_push*, lua_get*, lua_call*, lua_pcall, stack manipulation
Internal API helpers; api_incr_top stack-overflow check macro, api_check assertion wrapper
Auxiliary library; luaL_loadfile, luaL_Buffer, luaL_ref, luaL_traceback, registry helpers
Auxiliary library header; luaL_Buffer, luaL_Reg, luaL_newstate, luaL_error declarations
Base library; luaB_print, luaB_pcall, luaB_xpcall, luaB_load, luaB_next, luaB_type
Code generator; emits VM instructions, manages patch lists (NO_JUMP), constant folding, jump fixup
Code generator header; BinOpr/UnOpr enums, expdesc result kinds, luaK_* function declarations
Coroutine library; luaB_cocreate, luaB_coresume, luaB_cowrap, luaB_costatus
Custom ctype table; luai_ctype_[] byte array for fast lislalpha/lisdigit/etc without locale dependency
Ctype macros; lislalpha, lisdigit, lisspace, lisprint defined over luai_ctype_[] table
Debug library; lua_sethook, lua_getinfo, lua_getlocal wrappers; hook table at registry[HOOKKEY]
Debug interface; luaG_runerror, luaG_typeerror, luaG_getfuncline, line/local/upvalue introspection
Debug header; pcRel pc-to-offset macro, ci_func, resethookcount, ABSLINEINFO sentinel declarations
Stack and call engine; luaD_call, luaD_pcall, luaD_throw, luaD_rawrunprotected, stack reallocation
Call/stack header; luaD_checkstackaux growth macro, condmovestack HARDSTACKTESTS hook, throw/catch decls
Bytecode serializer; DumpHeader, DumpFunction, DumpCode writing Proto to lua_Writer stream
Closure and prototype management; luaF_newCclosure, luaF_newLclosure, luaF_newUpval, open-upvalue list
Closure/upvalue header; sizeCclosure/sizeLclosure size macros, MAXUPVAL=255, isintwups check
Tri-color incremental garbage collector; mark/sweep/finalize phases, luaC_step, luaC_fullgc, barriers
GC header; white/gray/black color macros, luaC_barrier, luaC_barrierback, GC state constants
Standard library loader; stdlibs[] table mapping LUA_*LIBNAME to luaopen_* functions, luaL_openlibs
I/O library; LuaFile userdata wrapping FILE*, io.open/close/read/write/lines/seek, popen support
GCC computed-goto dispatch table; disptab[] mapping NUM_OPCODES to &&L_OP_* labels for lvm.c
Lexical analyzer; luaX_next token scanner, long strings, numeral parsing, reserved word table
Lexer header; Token/SemInfo structs, FIRST_RESERVED boundary, LexState, luaX_* declarations
Portability and type limits; l_mem/lu_mem, cast_* macros, MAXSTACK, luai_numunm, l_likely/unlikely
Math library; math_abs through math_tointeger, random/randomseed with xoshiro256** PRNG
Memory manager; luaM_realloc_, luaM_growaux_, emergency GC on alloc failure, debt accounting
Memory header; luaM_new/newvector/growvector macros, overflow-safe luaM_limitN size check
Dynamic loader; package.loadlib via dlopen/LoadLibrary, searchers for Lua/C modules, package.path
Generic object operations; luaO_str2num, luaO_pushvfstring, luaO_tostring, integer/float coercion
Core value/object type definitions; TValue tagged-union, GCObject CommonHeader, TString/Table/Proto layouts
Opcode mode table; luaP_opmodes[] encoding MM/OT/IT/T/A/format bits per opcode via opmode macro
VM instruction set; 32-bit iABC/iABx/isBx/iAx/isJ formats, OP_* enum, GET_OPCODE/GETARG_* macros
Opcode name strings; opnames[] char* array parallel to OP_* enum for disassembly/error messages
OS library; os.time/date/clock/difftime/exit/getenv/remove/rename/tmpname, strftime format validation
Recursive-descent parser; luaY_parser entry, statement/expression/block rules, expdesc construction
Parser header; expdesc expkind enum (VVOID..VINDEXSTR), FuncState, BlockCnt, Dyndata declarations
Must-include-first header; sets _XOPEN_SOURCE=600, _LARGEFILE_SOURCE, _FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 for POSIX
Global and thread state init; lua_newstate, luaE_newthread, luaE_freethread, allgc list setup
State structures; lua_State with stack/ci/twups/hookcount, global_State with GC roots and string table
Interned string table; luaS_newlstr hash+dedup, short vs long string split at LUAI_MAXSHORTLEN=40
String header; MEMERRMSG preallocated OOM string, LUAI_MAXSHORTLEN, luaS_new/eqlngstr declarations
String library; string.format, pattern match/find/gmatch/gsub, string.pack/unpack/packsize
Hash table; dual array+hash layout, Brent's variation chaining, luaH_set/get/resize/next
Table header; gnode/gval/gnext access macros, invalidateTMcache, BITDUMMY flag, luaH_* declarations
Table library; table.insert/remove/sort (adaptive merge+quick), table.move, table.concat
Internal test module; memory limit injection, GC stress, opcode checkers, C test functions exposed to Lua
Test header; enables LUA_DEBUG/LUAI_ASSERT, redefines allocator for memory fault injection
Tag method (metamethod) dispatch; luaT_typenames_, luaT_gettm, luaT_callTM, __index/__newindex chains
Metamethod enum; TM_INDEX..TM_CLOSE ordered enum, TM_N count, fast-access cutoff at TM_EQ
Standalone interpreter; REPL loop, LUA_INIT handling, signal handler, dofile/dostring startup
Public API header; lua_State, TValue-free types, lua_push*/lua_to*/lua_call*/lua_pcall declarations
Master configuration; LUA_INT_TYPE, LUA_FLOAT_TYPE, LUAI_MAXSTACK, path defaults, platform detection
Standard library registry; LUA_*LIBNAME constants, LUA_*LIBK bitmask flags, luaopen_* declarations
Bytecode loader; LoadHeader magic/version check, LoadFunction rebuilds Proto from luac binary format
Undump header; LUAC_DATA/INT/INST/NUM verification constants, LUAC_VERSION nibble encoding
UTF-8 library; utf8.codes/codepoint/char/len/offset, MAXUNICODE=0x10FFFF decoder/encoder
Main interpreter loop; luaV_execute dispatch over all opcodes, arithmetic/comparison/metamethod calls
VM header; cvt2str/cvt2num coercion macros, luaV_execute/luaV_objcomp/luaV_idiv declarations
Buffered input stream; luaZ_fill refill callback, luaZ_read block reader over ZIO
ZIO stream header; zgetc single-char macro, Mbuffer dynamic buffer, luaZ_initbuffer/resetbuffer
Unity build entry; #includes all core + lib sources for single-TU compilation via gcc -o lua onelua.c -lm
